title: Rehabilitation of M1 Road Section Blantyre-Zomba (Km 42-68)
description_short: Rehabilitation of M1 Road Section Blantyre-Zomba (Km 42-68) — Procurement notice from National Roads Authority
description_long: The National Roads Authority invites sealed bids from eligible firms for rehabilitation of m1 road section blantyre-zomba (km 42-68). Interested bidders may obtain further information and tender documents from the Procurement Unit of National Roads Authority.
